subcodes.first_line: O distinguished branch of the Blessed Tree! Show utmost consideration to Jinab-i-Aqa Mirza Mahmud Furughi [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ایها الفرع البدیع من السدره المبارکه بجناب آقا میرزا محمود فروغی نهایت رعایت
subcodes.subjects: @love, unity, and fellowship among the friends; in the Cause, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
